HKJK Delivery

  • HKJK doesn't have a dedicated Delivery Position, with Nairobi Apron (HKJK_GND) assuming the role of Delivery.

IFR Clearance Rules

VFR Clearance Rules

VFR aircraft clearance must come from the tower controller, but the ground controller should get some information from the pilot and taxi them out to a runway before they receive their clearance.

When a VFR aircraft calls for clearance, they must include the following: - Souls on board - Fuel on board - Intentions

If the aircraft does not include any of the above, the information must be requested before a clearance is given.

Once all the information has been received from the pilot, the controller must then issue start clearance and taxi instructions to a runway holding point. Once the aircraft is at the holding point, they can receive their clearance.

At this point the aircraft must be handed to tower so that the tower controller can provide the aircraft with a clearance.

Cruise Level Rules

* Kenyan Airspace operates with the following RVSM standard table of Cruising Levels.

Magnetic Track 000º to 179º 180º to 359º
Flight Rules IFR VFR IFR VFR
Flight Level 010 - 020 -
030 035 040 045
050 055 060 065
070 075 080 085
090 095 100 105
110 115 120 125
130 135 140 145
150 155 160 165
170 175 180 185
190 195 200 205
210 215 220 225
230 235 240 245
250 255 260 265
270 275 280 285
290 - 300 -
310 - 320 -
330 - 340 -
350 - 360 -
370 - 380 -
390 - 400 -
410 - 430 -
450 - 470 -
490 - 510 -
530 - 550 -
570 - 590 -
etc - etc -

Departure Procedures & Initial Climbs

Rwy Fix Departure Transition Type Initial Climb Remarks
06 ANTUK ANTUK2D APKUB RNAV FL120 To HKKI Only
APLOG FL100 -
NAKAT FL120 -
UTERA To HKEL Only
APKUB APKUB1A - FL100 -
APLOG APLOG2B - -
ATUDU ATUDU1D EVOGO FL110 -
GABSO FL210 ATUDU by FL110, then direct EPSUS level by FL210, then direct GABSO
IBROM FL110 -
LOSIN -
NORVU -
UTATA -
UVOVA -
WAJIR 112.5 WAV
ETORU ETORU1A KAMAS FL190 -
KIMET -
LOTAS -

EVATO1Y - FL110 -
EVATO1Z - 8000ft -
GABSO GABSO1Y - FL110 -
GABSO1Z - 8000ft -
KAMAS KAMAS1W - FL150 -
KAMAS1X - FL140 -
KAMAS1Y - -

LOTAS LOTAS1Y - FL140 -
LOTAS1Z - -

LOTAS

NAKAT1Z - FL100 -

KIMET -
LOTAS FL190 FL190 level by ETORU, then direct LOTAS
NAK FL100 115.1 NAK

UTERA To HKEL Only
KAMAS KAMAS1U - FL100 Turn left to NV R337 to KAMAS, level FL140 at D30.0 NV
KAMAS1V - Once at FL100 at D25.0 NV, turn left level by FL150 at D45.0 NV
